items.title: [负面] pvp匹配机制就是纯恶心人的，比市面上的moba游戏还恶心。当你赢了一把或连胜之后，就会匹配半天给你...
items.summary: pvp匹配机制就是纯恶心人的，比市面上的moba游戏还恶心。当你赢了一把或连胜之后，就会匹配半天给你匹配刚好克制你阵容，对面还会顺到离谱。就算你是六边形阵容，也会各种关键牌不来，对面会是爆发阵容，三四回合就把你主c干死，或者打的你只剩一个残血角色，还没牌可出。策划就是傻逼，可惜游戏底子还不错。还有PVE模式，一个打牌游戏，居然靠直接限制玩家出牌数量来增加难度。做不好平衡干脆就别做了。所有池子都是基本保底才出的，而且还很容易歪。进了普池的限定角色几乎是不可能出来的，抽满的角色出的概率比没抽满的出的概率高。而且补偿奖励也是聊胜于无。别的抽卡游戏，氪金好歹让你爽，这游戏是又肝又氪又不让你爽。建议养老玩法，最好别氪。

items.title:
[正面] Honestly this game is amazing.

The Slay the Spire...
items.summary:
Honestly this game is amazing.

The Slay the Spire influences are quite obvious (with slaythespire being a redemption code you can use), but it doesn't feel like a complete rip-off. Each character feels unique and plays differently, and character designs are good. There are a few which I could consider “boring,” but it’s mostly just a few standard units who were around during launch.

The game is quite generous. Just going through the story and doing events has gotten me enough pulls to hit the 1000 mark before 75 hours, and I have at least one copy of every standard unit (even if Aequor took a while thanks to a certain greedy man with shark teeth). Rates are also pretty generous, with 3.03% SSR rate (and a 5% overall rate), 33% rate up, pity at 30 pills, and guaranteed Rate-Ups after two failed SSRs. 

This does come to my first major complaint, though. The game is VERY dupe heavy, with each Awakener and WoD requiring you to pull 16 copies to max them out completely. While you don’t need 16 copies for each character to be good, a few of them still need a good number of them. The difference between some units E0s and E3s are night and day. Take the current Rate-Up Awakener, Kathigu-Ra, for example. She is a really good AOE burst damage dealer whose kit is based on building up Combust stacks by playing her cards while they have Fiamma on them. For E0-2, you only get 1 Fiamma stack on a card per turn, and while it does transfer between cards when played, it still takes you several turns to reach the 10 Combust stacks required to do her burst turn. But once you get her E3, her burst turns can happen turn 1. This is because her E3 gives her a Fiamma stack on all of her cards at the start of a battle, jumping her from a D-Tier unit all the way to A-Tier, and S-Tier once you get Over-Exalt with 4 more dupes.

This means that certain units are just unplayable until you reach an arbitrary point that is completely reliant on RNG, and changes from character to character. Some characters, like Hameln and Karen, are playable right out of the gate, while other ones, like Thais and Corposant, are reliant on getting E2. It’s frustrating getting a shiny new character and being told I can’t use them cause I haven’t met their power spike.

[strike] Another pain point is the AI translations. I already have reservations about AI, but the devs have confirmed that they are working on getting actual translators. Until then, I have been skipping the story. It isn’t too much of an issue, since the game has a story mode that lets me experience the cutscenes without having to replay the stages. I know that once actual translations come out, I’ll be sitting down to marathon the whole story, cause I heard it is one of the best stories out there. For now, the gameplay is strong enough for me to keep coming back for more. [/strike]

I often find myself sitting down to play a little because I’m bored, and before I know it, 4 hours have passed and I’m having the time of my life sitting at 1 HP while I load up a 12k DMG Hyperflare  right into the chapter’s final boss’ face. Few other games have ever had that kind of hook in me in recent times.

Overall, I’m in love with this game. With the news of better translations, voice acting, and more coming soon, I’m super excited for this game’s future.

TL;DR: 8/10, gameplay is amazing, characters are amazing, gacha is generous but dupe heavy, and the translations are passable at best, but are being actively improved. I implore any fans of gacha games, roguelike deck builders, and Lovecraftian stories to pick this game up.

2nd Anniversary Update: Game is finally fully hand translated (in english). A bunch of quality of life changes have also been added, so I'm happy to say the game is a solid 9/10 now.

items.title: [正面]        玩的时间不长，但就我个人来看，忘却给我的初体验挺不错的（就是一些技能和机制的小作文看了...
items.summary:
玩的时间不长，但就我个人来看，忘却给我的初体验挺不错的（就是一些技能和机制的小作文看了有点头晕，但花花时间也不难理解）。在我玩过的二游中算的上是中上水平。实际上，相较于某些二游，忘却的确优秀不少。总之呢，忘却有好的地方（风格、福利等），也同样有坏的地方（走格子耗时、官方攻略少等），主要还是看自己的喜好啦。
       不过我有个问题（本人完全不了解克系）：忘却到底算不算“克苏鲁风格”呢？
       以上观点全为个人臆断，如有不符请见谅，如有冒犯也请见谅，拜托各位，拜托拜托……
